style_prompt: Editorial cover illustration for a whitepaper. Muted Alberta cream (#F7F4ED) base, navy (#1A3A6E) and rust (#C2491A) accents. Print-quality archival feel. No text, no logos. Wide cover aspect.
image_prompt: An editorial cover illustration on warm cream paper, deep Alberta navy line work with small rust-coloured accents. Three broad stone steps rise from lower left to upper right, like a graduated ascent. On the first step rests a simple speech-bubble motif; on the second, a small gear with a tiny robot token; on the third, a clean application window outline. A wide calm sky behind them. Archival, calm, and confident. Wide cover aspect. No text, no logos, no people.
